title: Trading Topic Schema
description: Schema for organizing trading education topics and learning paths

section.description: Main section this topic belongs to

summary.description: Brief summary of what this subtopic covers
summary.example: Learn how to calculate the maximum amount you should risk per trade based on your account size to preserve capital and avoid ruin

subtopics.description: Array of subtopics within this topic

prerequisites.description: Topic IDs that should be learned before this one

estimated_time_minutes.description: Estimated time to complete this topic

related_topics.description: Topic IDs that are related but not prerequisites

source.description: Where this topic content came from

subtopics.title: What is Support and Resistance?
subtopics.summary: Understand how support and resistance are price levels where supply and demand meet, causing price to bounce or reverse

subtopics.title: Identifying S/R on Charts
subtopics.summary: Learn to visually identify support and resistance by looking for price bounces, wicks, and reversal patterns

subtopics.title: Dynamic vs Static Levels
subtopics.summary: Distinguish between horizontal S/R levels and dynamic levels like trendlines and moving averages

subtopics.title: Using S/R for Trading Entries and Exits
subtopics.summary: Learn how professional traders use support and resistance for entry, stop loss, and take profit placement

subtopics.title: The Concept of Bounce vs Break
subtopics.summary: Understand the difference between price bouncing from a level and breaking through it, and what it signals

subtopics.title: Currency Pairs Explained
subtopics.summary: Learn what currency pairs are, how they're quoted, and why we trade them in pairs rather than individually

subtopics.title: Pips, Lot Sizes, and Position Sizing
subtopics.summary: Understand the basic units of measurement in forex: pips, lots, and how position size affects your profit/loss

subtopics.title: The Forex Market Structure
subtopics.summary: Overview of who trades forex, major currency pairs, trading sessions (London, New York, Asian), and typical volatility

subtopics.title: Leverage and Margin
subtopics.summary: What leverage is, how margin works, and why it's dangerous if not managed carefully

subtopics.title: Fear and Greed in Trading
subtopics.summary: Recognize how fear and greed affect decision-making and how to manage these emotions for better trading

subtopics.title: Building a Trading Routine
subtopics.summary: Create consistent pre-trade and post-trade routines that keep you disciplined and emotionally stable

subtopics.title: Dealing with Losing Streaks
subtopics.summary: Strategies to maintain confidence and discipline during inevitable losing streaks without abandoning your strategy

subtopics.title: The Revenge Trading Trap
subtopics.summary: Understand why revenge trading occurs and how to prevent it from destroying your account

subtopics.title: What is TDA (Trading Day Algorithm)?
subtopics.summary: Understand the concept of smart money movement and how TDA identifies where institutions are trading

subtopics.title: Entry Models: BPB and CHoCH
subtopics.summary: Learn two key entry models: Break of Previous Bar (BPB) and Change of Character (CHoCH)

subtopics.title: Internal vs External Liquidity
subtopics.summary: Distinguish between internal liquidity (stop runs) and external liquidity (sweeps of key levels)

subtopics.title: Confluence with Entry Models
subtopics.summary: How to combine entry models with support/resistance, moving averages, and other confluence factors
